scope: B8.0 information-contract / randomized paired audit canary -- manifest (pins).
status: development-only | NOT confirmatory | NOT deployable | NOT validation (Lee2019 SM16 geometry is a realistic Z/subject substrate, NOT a real randomized audit) | NO tag
authorized: reviewer-authorized 2026-07-06 after B7.1 SAFETY-FAIL closed the observational null-repair line (B3->B4->B5->B6->B7)
estimand: condition-specific boundary/conditional-structure evidence BEYOND label-prior shift, under a randomized/counterbalanced paired audit contract (a condition x Z boundary interaction not explainable by randomized assignment variation, label-prior margins, or block/time/session nuisance). Prior shift stays a nuisance.

method.inversion: stop repairing observational nulls; REQUIRE a known randomization contract (C assigned by balanced randomization within subject x block -> C _|_ Z within block by design); use an EXACT block-stratified randomization null; REFUSE when the contract is unmet.
method.contract_validator: check_contract(Z,C,G,Block,seed) [NO Y]: (1) block-adjusted cross-fit AUC(C~Z) <= TAU_CONTRACT_AUC; (2) >= MIN_SUPPORT_BLOCKS blocks with both conditions. Fail -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_UNIDENTIFIABLE. Run BEFORE T.
method.exact_null: resample_C_exact: within each (subject,block,class) stratum, uniform permutation of C preserving per-(block,class) counts EXACTLY (the KNOWN within-block randomization; class margins held -> prior is nuisance). NOT a fitted propensity. Recompute the byte-reused B3 cross-fit contrast T(Y,Z,C*).
method.alert_rule: ALERT (B8_CONCEPT_ALERT) iff estimable (n_exact_invalid <= 0.20*n_boot) AND p_meanT <= ALPHA_BUDGET AND p_stud <= ALPHA_BUDGET AND n_eligible >= min_confirm_pairs. No oracle/router/observed_T threshold; no B7 witness state.

seeds.note: 600 seeds all unique; zero intersection with all prior CSC jsonl (B5/P3/R1/B6/B7). No seed reuse.

substrate.dataset: Lee2019 / OpenBMI SM16 log-bandpower features (real EEG geometry)
substrate.role: realistic Z/subject substrate for the emulator; semi-synthetic worlds injected on top; NOT validation

worlds.note: 12 worlds run in this canary. VIOLATION_cov_plus_prior is the B7.1-killer's confounded form (expect REFUSE); CONTRACT_NULL_cov_plus_prior is its randomized form (expect controlled).

screen.contract_violating: CONTRACT_INVALID high AND B8_CONCEPT_ALERT <= 3/50 (correct REFUSAL, not false-alert)

files.b8_stage0_rows.jsonl: 600 per-cohort B8 rows (12 shards concatenated in world_index order)
files.b8_stage0_tables.json: per-world state distribution + medians + kind-specific screen + verdict + red_team block
files.b8_stage0_redteam_checks.json: result red-team (wtnmjmp1d): accounting_isolation=PASS, science=MINOR_ISSUE + 1 HIGH asterisk
files.README.md: human-readable summary + the two red-team caveats
